narrative:
Precinct Sunsbury (precinct in Monroe County) has 754 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
